name: Triclabendazole
description: Triclabendazole has been used in trials studying Parasitic Disease.

interactions.name: Chloroquine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Triclabendazole can be decreased when it is combined with Chloroquine.

interactions.name: Amodiaquine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Triclabendazole can be decreased when it is combined with Amodiaquine.

interactions.name: Primaquine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Triclabendazole can be decreased when it is combined with Primaquine.

interactions.name: Hydroxychloroquine
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Triclabendazole can be decreased when it is combined with Hydroxychloroquine.
